title: requests — feature keys
description: Feature keys this module publishes for the tenant-facing entitlements catalogue. Every tenant on every plan tier gets base access requests on by default — the module is a substrate, not a premium feature. Reminder + bulk-approve are tier-gated.

reference.seededFrom: consumer modules — access-requests base is always on

features.description: Google-Docs-style request-access flow. When a User hits a resource they don't have permission for, they can request access; approvers decide; approval materialises a time-bounded grant. Always on.
Nightly nudges to approvers who haven't decided on a pending request older than 24h. Reduces stale-request friction — requesters get an outcome faster.
Approver-side: select N pending requests and approve them in one action (writes N decisions atomically). Enterprise-only — reduces cognitive load on approvers who handle 10+ requests per day.
Enterprise tenants can override the default 7-day grant TTL per resource type via `#[AccessRequestable(defaultGrantTtlDays: N)]`. Standard tiers use the platform default.
